tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: The installation of the downloaded package indicates an invalid package

abstract.p: The installation of the downloaded package indicates an invalid package.
This can be reported when the install from the settings editor fails. The software version that is downloaded on the engine can be removed by doing a revoke in ORS (On Remote Service).

tsCauses.p: The installation of the downloaded package indicates an invalid package.

tsResolve.p: The revoke button can be found in ORS (On Remote Service) on the page of specific engine, at the Remote data section.
In there a software entry is found. When opening that page the revoke button is shown.
When revoke is pushed an action is prepared for the engine to remove the downloaded version.
This can take up to 15 minutes. In the transaction log the creation and reception of the action are to be listed.
